info.title: Centriton Platform
info.description: Corporate Intelligence, ESG Certification & Board Governance OS

get.description: Get all Digital Twin states for a company.
Get a specific twin state (financial, esg, risk, etc.).
Get historical KPIs for a company.

post.description:
Upload one or more documents and process them in parallel.

Each file runs through its own independent worker agent graph.
One file failing never affects the others.
All DB writes happen inside the save_to_db node — this route touches disk only.

get.description: List all documents for a company.
Get document details and extraction status.
Filter agents by class: worker, analyst, compliance, strategy, narrative.

post.description:
Trigger an agent manually.

This runs synchronously — for production, use a task queue.

get.description: Get agent execution history for a company.
List all reports for a company.

post.description: Publish an approved report to a distribution channel.

Create a new report for a company and ingest the attached documents.

Flow:
  1. Validate company + sector + scope-specific fields.
  2. Resolve the full set of frameworks the user picked (global code list
     OR union of primary_frameworks for chosen regulators).
  3. Insert a draft `reports` row with the full selection captured in
     `generation_config` (so nothing the user chose is lost, even if we
     can't ingest it all today).
  4. For each uploaded file, reuse `_process_single_file` from
     document_routes — it runs the full worker pipeline (extract →
     esg_harvest → normalize → save). The worker writes `report_id` into
     every downstream row (documents, digital_twin_states, esg_evidence).

MVP caveat: only GRI is loaded in framework_indicators today, so the
pipeline is invoked with frameworks filtered to the available set. The
full user selection is still persisted on the report row.

Attach more documents to an existing report.

Scope (year, sector, frameworks, regulators) is read from the report's
stored generation_config — the caller never re-enters params. Files go
through the same worker pipeline as /generate, with report_id threaded
so every downstream row (documents, digital_twin_states, esg_evidence)
is stamped with this report.

get.description:
Return every indicator in the report's framework scope, tagged
FOUND / PARTIAL / NOT_DISCLOSED.

NOT_DISCLOSED rows are derived on the fly via LEFT JOIN — they are not
persisted in esg_evidence. An indicator that appears in multiple
documents shows the highest-confidence evidence as its primary record;
pass include_duplicates=true to see the rest under additional_evidence.

patch.description: Activate, suspend, or deactivate a user.

get.description: All active sectors — used for the sector dropdown on the report form.
Distinct regions from the countries table.

Active regulators, optionally filtered by country_id.
Each row includes its primary_frameworks so the UI can show what
frameworks that regulator enforces.
Framework catalog. MVP only supports scope=global → GRI / IFRS_S1 / IFRS_S2.
